Added CFBundleDisplayName=Cenno to iPhone + Watch Info.plist

Per-config entitlements: Debug=development, Release=production aps-environment. Added CennoiPhone.Release.entitlements, switched iPhone target to per-config CODE_SIGN_ENTITLEMENTS in project.yml, regenerated + verified via showBuildSettings.

Verified: CennoRelayTest is a separate macOS target with its own scheme; CennoiPhone/CennoWatch archive schemes only build their own targets, so RelayTest is never part of an iOS/watchOS archive. No change needed.
App Store Connect app record created (Apple ID 6780882240, store name 'Cenno Companion', bundle app.cenno.companion). Name 'Cenno' was taken; home-screen label remains 'Cenno'.

Deployed Prompt record type + 19 indexes (state/expires_at queryable, created_at sortable) + role perms to Production CloudKit via dashboard Deploy Schema Changes. Verified: Production env now lists Prompt (13 fields). Additive deploy, no data loss.

Privacy labels + export compliance done. (1) Export compliance: ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption=false now on BOTH companion + watch targets via project.yml (commit 70e8ab7) — TestFlight won't prompt per-build. (2) App Privacy nutrition label set to 'Data Not Collected' in ASC (audit confirmed no analytics/SDKs/external networking; prompt data lives in user's private CloudKit, developer has no access). (3) Privacy Policy URL set to https://cenno.salient.community/privacy (new page deployed, commit ac15fb7). NOTE: App Privacy 'Publish' button intentionally left for app-submission time (it's gated to the review flow); both inputs are saved.

Distribution signing PROVEN via successful App Store upload. xcodebuild -exportArchive (method app-store-connect, automatic signing, -allowProvisioningUpdates) minted the Apple Distribution cert + App Store provisioning profiles for app.cenno.companion + .watch and signed the build. Required a NEW Admin-role App Store Connect API key (KY2K3HP233) — the pre-existing Developer-role key (8S89DZRB8R) lacked cloud-signing permission. Archive scheme: CennoiPhone (embeds Watch+Shared). Build 1.0(1) uploaded OK 2026-06-18.

Spike validated Rust ort 2.0 path: builds 32s, self-contained preprocessing (no g2p/subprocess), CPU. Latency=text-len x steps: short say @steps5 ~0.5s (meets target), long body @steps8 ~6s (too slow). Mitigation: speak short say + cap steps ~5-6. Assets ~380MB on disk.
